titleStmt.title: SII 22.8: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 8. (A.R. No. 8 of 1906) SALEM DISTRICT, NAMAKKAL TALUK, NĀMAKKAL. RAṄGANĀTHA TEMPLE ON THE HILL-ON SLABS BUILT INTO THE WALLS OF THE ROOM AT THE ENTRANCE.

summary.p: This is a collection of some fragmentary pieces of writing of about the 13th century A.D. The inscription of which these should have formed parts, is dated in the reign of a certain Tribhuvanachakravartin••••• and seems to register a gift of land as Tirumaḍaippaḷḷippuṟam to the temple of Vēdanāyaka-perumāḷ on the hill at Tiruvāraikkal, and gives the names of some benificiaries of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—ṅkarayaṉum I—
—ppatiyil vetanāyaka—
—tarai Umakkicaiyap �—
—ppirān tātaṟku tirukuṭan—
—ṭalai tirukkaliveṉṟa tāta—

—ṭaikuṭi periyaperumāḷ tātar—
—raṅkanārāyaṇa tātaṟkum I—
—pen tiruvālinampikkum tā—
—ṭuttāruṭpaṭa paṅkukkum tiru—
—ttil Inta Akaram paṭṭarkaḷ—
—ṭatu Oru māvāka paṉṉi—
tile Aññūṟu kuḻi�—

—sti śrī tiripuvaṉaccakka—
—vāraikkal vetana—
— ya nāṭṭu vaṭakarai—
—lam Iraṇṭu māvum A—
—yili nilamāka paṉṉiru—
—l Iruveli nilamum—
—ṟaiyili muṟṟu —
—ivvakarappa

—tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāvatākavum—
—vetaṉ kāri māṟappirāṉ tātaṟkum tiru—
—ruppullāṇitātaṟku tiṭṭaikuṭi—
—yakan mātavan tiruvāli nampikkum—
—uttamanampikku mivar tampi Eṭut—
—vil Akarapaṭṭarkaḷukkuceyvi—

—vikkellai ṉ tampi teci Āḷap—
—muṭikolli maḻaināṭṭut tiruvā�—
—koyilil tampiyum tiruman—
—karapaṭṭarkaḷ gauta—
—celuttuvitāka—
Digital edition of SII 22.8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
